title: rubus castellarnaui
intro: Rubus castellanus, also known as the Castellana raspberry, is a species of thorny shrub in the rose family native to Italy. The medicinal properties of Rubus castellanus include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as digestive problems, and its extracts have been shown to have anti-cancer properties, potentially reducing the risk of certain cancers. Rubus castellanus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it accessible for those seeking natural remedies.
